        <style>
        .paxtu-lato-screen {
            font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif !important;
        }

        .paxtu-page-header {
            font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif;
            font-weight: 800;
            font-size: 32px;
            line-height: 40px;
        }

        /* Remover sombra/efeito hover nos cards/boards da lista de associados */
        .associate-list .card,
        .associate-list .card:hover,
        .associate-list .card:focus,
        .associate-list .shadow,
        .associate-list .shadow-sm,
        .associate-list .shadow-lg,
        .associate-list [class*="board"] {
            -webkit-box-shadow: none !important;
            box-shadow: none !important;
            transform: none !important;
            transition: none !important;
        }

        .associate-list *:hover {
            -webkit-box-shadow: none !important;
            box-shadow: none !important;
        }

        .associate-list.is-loading,
        #pagination-container.is-loading {
            opacity: 0.55;
            pointer-events: none;
            transition: opacity 0.2s ease;
        }

        .associate-list-loading {
            min-height: 120px;
        }
    </style>
    
    <style>
        #cookieConsent {
            z-index: 100000;
            display: none;
            width: 100%;
            position: fixed;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 0;
            background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95);
            padding: 20px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            box-shadow: 0 0 7px rgb(0 0 0 / 50%);
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }

        #cookieConsentText {
            background: var(--paxtu-dark);
            transition: 0.3s all ease;
            -o-transition: 0.3s all ease;
            -ms-transition: 0.3s all ease;
            -moz-transition: 0.3s all ease;
            -webkit-transition: 0.3s all ease;
            color: #FFFFFF;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 1px rgb(0 0 0 / 20%);
            border-radius: 2px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
            border-bottom-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            font-size: 14px;
            padding: 6px 14px;
            cursor: pointer;
            line-height: 19px;
        }

        #acceptCookies {
            background: var(--paxtu-dark);
            transition: 0.3s all ease;
            -o-transition: 0.3s all ease;
            -ms-transition: 0.3s all ease;
            -moz-transition: 0.3s all ease;
            -webkit-transition: 0.3s all ease;
            color: #FFFFFF;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 1px rgb(0 0 0 / 20%);
            border-radius: 2px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
            border-bottom-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            font-size: 14px;
            padding: 6px 14px;
            cursor: pointer;
            line-height: 19px;
        }

        .link-meupaxtu {
            color: #0d6efd;
        }

        .link-meupaxtu:hover {
            color: #083579;
        }

        #acceptCookies:hover {
            background: var(--paxtu-mid);

        }
    </style>

            <div class="toast-body d-flex align-items-center ">
                <input type="checkbox" id="checkInput" onclick="return false;" />
                <label class="labelCheck me-3" for="checkInput">
                    <div class="checkIconDiv"></div>
                </label>

                <p class="m-0 label-bold-large" style="color: var(--paxtu-dark);">Sucesso!</p>
            </div>
            <button type="button" class="btn-close me-3 m-auto" data-bs-dismiss="toast" aria-label="Close"></button>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

        </span>
        <button id="acceptCookies" class="rounded ms-3">Confirmar</button>

    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/fabric@latest/dist/index.min.js"></script>

    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/sweetalert2@11"></script>

    <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', async function() {
            const storageKey = 'paxtu-news-version-seen';

            try {
                const response = await fetch('https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/atualizacoes/ultima', {
                    headers: {
                        'Accept': 'application/json'
                    }
                });

                if (!response.ok) {
                    return;
                }

                const latest = await response.json();

                if (!latest || !latest.version || typeof Swal === 'undefined') {
                    return;
                }

                if (window.localStorage.getItem(storageKey) === latest.version) {
                    return;
                }

                Swal.fire({
                    title: latest.title || 'Atualizações do sistema',
                    text: latest.summary || 'Temos atualizações publicadas para você.',
                    icon: 'info',
                    confirmButtonText: 'Ver Atualizações',
                    showCancelButton: true,
                    cancelButtonText: 'Agora não'
                }).then(function(result) {
                    window.localStorage.setItem(storageKey, latest.version);

                    if (result.isConfirmed && latest.url) {
                        window.location.href = latest.url;
                    }
                });
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Erro ao carregar atualizações:', error);
            }
        });
    </script>


            <script>
            // Desativar o clique com o botão direito do mouse (somente em produção)
            document.addEventListener('contextmenu', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
            });

            // Desativar teclas que abrem ferramentas de dev (F12 e Ctrl+Shift+I)
            // Nota: usar addEventListener evita sobrescrever handlers existentes.
            document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
                // F12
                if (e.key === 'F12' || e.keyCode === 123) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    return false;
                }

                // Ctrl+Shift+I (atalho comum para abrir o inspector)
                if (e.ctrlKey && e.shiftKey && (e.key === 'I' || e.key === 'i' || e.keyCode === 73)) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    return false;
                }
            });
        </script>
    

    
    <script src="https://www.drcode.com.br/nofollow/aviso-cookies/drcode.cookies.js"></script>
    <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
            // Verificar se o consentimento já foi dado
            if (!Cookies.get('cookieConsent')) {
                document.getElementById('cookieConsent').style.display = 'flex';
            }

            // Adicionar evento de clique ao botão de aceitar
            document.getElementById('acceptCookies').addEventListener('click', function() {
                Cookies.set('cookieConsent', 'accepted', {
                    expires: 365
                });
                document.getElementById('cookieConsent').style.display = 'none';
            });

        });
    </script>


    <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
            if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && 'Notification' in window) {
                try {
                    if (Notification.permission !== "granted") {
                        Notification.requestPermission().catch(function() {});
                    }
                } catch (e) {
                    console.warn('Notification API not available:', e);
                }
            }
        });

        function notifyUser(title, message) {
            if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && 'Notification' in window) {
                try {
                    if (Notification.permission === "granted") {
                        new Notification(title, {
                            body: message,
                        });
                        return;
                    }
                } catch (e) {
                    console.warn('Showing Notification failed:', e);
                }
            }

            // Fallback: if an in-app toast function exists, use it; otherwise log to console
            if (typeof showInAppToast === 'function') {
                showInAppToast(message);
            } else {
                console.log('notifyUser fallback:', title, message);
            }
        }
        $(document).ready(function() {

            var headerExists = $('.row').find('header').length > 0;
            if (headerExists) {
                $('main').css('height', '89dvh');
            } else {
                $('main').css('height', '99dvh');
            }
            if (navigator.userAgent.indexOf("Firefox") != -1) {
                document.body.classList.add('firefox');
            }
        });

                $('#loading-spinner').removeClass('d-none').addClass('d-flex');
            } else {
                $('#loading-spinner').removeClass('d-flex').addClass('d-none');
            }
        }

        const tooltipTriggerList = document.querySelectorAll('[data-bs-toggle="tooltip"]')
        const tooltipList = [...tooltipTriggerList].map(tooltipTriggerEl => new bootstrap.Tooltip(tooltipTriggerEl))

            <script>
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
                try {
                    const timezone = Intl.DateTimeFormat().resolvedOptions().timeZone;

                    fetch('/set-timezone', {
                        method: 'POST',
                        headers: {
                            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                            'X-CSRF-TOKEN': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]').content
                        },
                        body: JSON.stringify({
                            timezone: timezone
                        })
                    });
                } catch (e) {
                    console.error('Erro ao detectar timezone:', e);
                }
            });
        </script>

        <script>
        $(document).ready(function() {
            let page = 1;
            let ajaxRequest = null;
            const baseSearchUrl = 'https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/associado/lista/carregar';

            function syncMoreFiltersButton() {
                if ($('#moreFilters').hasClass('show')) {
                    $('#toggleMoreFilters').html('Mostrar menos filtros &nbsp<i class="bi bi-dash-circle"></i>');
                    return;
                }

                $('#toggleMoreFilters').html('Mostrar mais filtros &nbsp<i class="bi bi-plus-circle"></i>');
            }

            function getSearchPayload(includePage = true) {
                const payload = {
                    branch_id: $('#search_branch').val() || '',
                    name: $('#search_name').val() || '',
                    registration: $('#search_registration').val() || '',
                    category: $('#search_category_desktop').is(':visible') ? $('#search_category_desktop').val() : $('#search_category_mobile').val(),
                    'function': $('#search_function').val() || '',
                    section: $('#search_section').val() || '',
                    status: $('#search_status').val() || '',
                };

                if (includePage) {
                    payload.page = page;
                }

                return payload;
            }

            function loadAssociates(currentPage = 1, requestUrl = baseSearchUrl, includePage = true) {
                page = currentPage;

                const requestData = requestUrl === baseSearchUrl ? getSearchPayload(includePage) : {};
                const associateList = $('.associate-list');
                const paginationContainer = $('#pagination-container');
                const hasRenderedList = associateList.children().length > 0;

                if (ajaxRequest) {
                    ajaxRequest.abort();
                }

                ajaxRequest = $.ajax({
                    url: requestUrl,
                    type: 'get',
                    data: requestData,
                    beforeSend: function() {
                        if (hasRenderedList) {
                            associateList.addClass('is-loading');
                            paginationContainer.addClass('is-loading');
                            return;
                        }

                        associateList.html(
                            '<div class="my-3 text-center w-100 associate-list-loading" id="loadingList"><div class="spinner-border text-light" role="status" style="color: var(--paxtu-light) !important;"><span class="visually-hidden">Loading...</span></div></div>'
                        );
                    },
                    success: function(response) {
                        associateList.removeClass('is-loading');
                        paginationContainer.removeClass('is-loading');
                        $('#loadingList').remove();

                        if (response.html) {
                            associateList.html(response.html);
                            paginationContainer.html(response.pagination || '');
                        } else {
                            associateList.html(
                                '<div class="my-3 text-center w-100">Nenhum resultado encontrado</div>'
                            );
                            paginationContainer.empty();
                        }
                    },
                    error: function(xhr) {
                        associateList.removeClass('is-loading');
                        paginationContainer.removeClass('is-loading');
                        $('#loadingList').remove();
                        console.log(xhr.responseText);
                    }
                });
            }

            $('#search_branch').on('change', function() {
                loadAssociates(1);

            });

            $('#search_name').on('keyup', function() {
                loadAssociates(1);
            });
            $('#search_registration').on('keyup', function() {
                loadAssociates(1);
            });
            $('#search_category_desktop, #search_category_mobile').on('change', function() {
                loadAssociates(1);
            });
            $('#search_function').on('change', function() {
                loadAssociates(1);
            });

            $('#search_section').on('change', function() {
                loadAssociates(1);
            });

            $('#search_status').on('change', function() {
                loadAssociates(1);
            });

            $('#moreFilters').on('shown.bs.collapse', function() {
                syncMoreFiltersButton();
            });

            $('#moreFilters').on('hidden.bs.collapse', function() {
                syncMoreFiltersButton();
            });

            $(window).on('resize', function() {
                syncMoreFiltersButton();
            });

            syncMoreFiltersButton();

            loadAssociates(1);

            $(document).on('click', '#pagination-container .pagination a', function(event) {
                event.preventDefault();

                const href = $(this).attr('href');
                const pageMatch = href.match(/[?&]page=(\d+)/);
                const nextPage = pageMatch ? parseInt(pageMatch[1], 10) : 1;

                loadAssociates(nextPage, href, false);
            });

            $(document).on('click', '.associateButton', function() {
                let associate = $(this).data('bs-associate');
                //criar form para enviar o id do associado
                let form = document.createElement('form');

                let formAction = 'https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/perfil';
                form.setAttribute('action', formAction);
                form.setAttribute('method', 'POST');
                form.setAttribute('style', 'display: none');
                let input = document.createElement('input');
                input.setAttribute('type', 'hidden');
                input.setAttribute('name', 'associate_code');
                input.setAttribute('value', associate);
                let token = document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]').getAttribute(
                    'content');
                let tokenInput = document.createElement('input');
                tokenInput.setAttribute('type', 'hidden');
                tokenInput.setAttribute('name', '_token');
                tokenInput.setAttribute('value', token);
                form.appendChild(input);
                form.appendChild(tokenInput);
                document.body.appendChild(form);
                form.submit();
            });

            $(document).on('click', '.condecora', function(event) {
                event.stopPropagation();
                let associate = $(this).data('bs-associate');
                //criar form para enviar o id do associado
                let form = document.createElement('form');

                let formAction = 'https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/condecora';
                form.setAttribute('action', formAction);
                form.setAttribute('method', 'POST');
                form.setAttribute('style', 'display: none');
                let input = document.createElement('input');
                input.setAttribute('type', 'hidden');
                input.setAttribute('name', 'id');
                input.setAttribute('value', associate);
                let token = document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]').getAttribute(
                    'content');
                let tokenInput = document.createElement('input');
                tokenInput.setAttribute('type', 'hidden');
                tokenInput.setAttribute('name', '_token');
                tokenInput.setAttribute('value', token);
                form.appendChild(input);
                form.appendChild(tokenInput);
                document.body.appendChild(form);
                form.submit();
            });
        });
    </script>
    <script>
        const checkLoader = document.getElementById('checkLoader')

        function successFeedback() {
            const toastBootstrap = bootstrap.Toast.getOrCreateInstance(checkLoader)
            $('#checkInput').prop('checked', false);
            toastBootstrap.show()
            setTimeout(() => {
                $('#checkInput').prop('checked', true);
            }, 1000);

            $(checkLoader).on('hidden.bs.toast', function() {
                $('#checkInput').prop('checked', false);
            })
        }
    </script>
    <script>
        $(document).ready(function() {
            $('#Camada_1').on('click', function() {
                if (localStorage.getItem('clicks') === null) {
                    localStorage.setItem('clicks', 1);
                } else {
                    localStorage.setItem('clicks', parseInt(localStorage.getItem('clicks')) + 1);
                }
                if (parseInt(localStorage.getItem('clicks')) === 20) {
                    alert('-..-. . .- ... - . .-. -....- . --. --.');
                    localStorage.removeItem('clicks');
                }
            });
        });
    </script>
    
        <script>
        (function() {
            function normalizePath(path) {
                if (!path) {
                    return '/';
                }

                var normalized = path.replace(/\/+$/, '') || '/';
                return normalized;
            }

            function getLinkPath(href) {
                if (!href || href === '#' || href.startsWith('javascript:')) {
                    return null;
                }

                try {
                    return normalizePath(new URL(href, window.location.origin).pathname);
                } catch (error) {
                    return null;
                }
            }

            function pathMatches(currentPath, linkPath) {
                if (linkPath === '/') {
                    return currentPath === '/';
                }

                if (currentPath === linkPath) {
                    return true;
                }

                return currentPath.startsWith(linkPath + '/');
            }

            function findBestMatch(links, currentPath) {
                var bestLink = null;
                var bestPath = '';

                links.forEach(function(link) {
                    var linkPath = getLinkPath(link.getAttribute('href'));

                    if (!linkPath || !pathMatches(currentPath, linkPath)) {
                        return;
                    }

                    if (linkPath.length > bestPath.length) {
                        bestLink = link;
                        bestPath = linkPath;
                    }
                });

                return bestLink;
            }

            function expandSidebarSection(link) {
                var collapse = link.closest('.collapse');

                if (!collapse) {
                    return;
                }

                collapse.classList.add('show');

                var toggle = document.querySelector('[data-bs-target="#' + collapse.id + '"]');

                if (toggle) {
                    toggle.classList.remove('collapsed');
                    toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
                }
            }

            function activateSidebarMenus() {
                var currentPath = normalizePath(window.location.pathname);

                document.querySelectorAll('.sideBar').forEach(function(sidebar) {
                    var links = sidebar.querySelectorAll('.btn-sidebar-nav a[href]');
                    var bestMatch = findBestMatch(Array.prototype.slice.call(links), currentPath);

                    if (!bestMatch) {
                        return;
                    }

                    bestMatch.classList.add('active');
                    expandSidebarSection(bestMatch);
                });
            }

            if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
                document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', activateSidebarMenus);
            } else {
                activateSidebarMenus();
            }
        })();
    </script>
    </body>

</html>
